items.source_title: Enterprise-Managed Authorization: Zero-touch OAuth for MCP
items.headline: MCP gets zero-touch enterprise OAuth
items.body: the MCP blog stabilized enterprise-managed authorization (EMA) — MCP servers can now delegate OAuth entirely to an org's identity provider via ID-JAG token exchange, no per-server consent screens. ADO MCP connects Claude to Azure DevOps; Azure AD is already the identity provider there. EMA could replace the current manual auth wiring with a declarative delegation that integrates cleanly with Microsoft's identity layer.
